metadata.description: A metacognitive co-developer marketplace - modular AI plugins for ground-truth establishment, hypothesis generation, creative synthesis, and self-guided context engineering on Windows

plugins.name: forensics
plugins.description: Ground-truth establishment - project mapping, defragmentation, documentation audit, anomaly disambiguation

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Build/change work - development planning, coding, testing, refactoring

plugins.name: inquiry
plugins.description: Investigation and research - hypothesis generation, data analysis, formalization, mathematics

plugins.name: conduit
plugins.description: Documentation and synthesis - technical docs, scholarly writing, handoff materials

plugins.name: trace
plugins.description: Metacognitive controller - routing supervision and smallest-sufficient intervention

plugins.name: lever
plugins.description: Evaluator and escalation authority - commitments, pivots, reopen rules

plugins.name: residue
plugins.description: Suspicious-surface lens library - investigative interventions for anomalies

plugins.name: primitives
plugins.description: Smallest reusable interventions - metacognitive and reasoning primitives

plugins.name: operators
plugins.description: Reusable operator classes - bounded local transformations and evaluations
